title: active low enable for tristate buffer

features.name: tristate buffer with conditional assign and high-z
features.description: Code should include a tristate buffer using conditional assignment with high-impedance output

features.name: inout wire bidirectional port
features.description: Code should include an inout wire declaration for a bidirectional pin

features.name: tristate buffer enable polarity active_low
features.description: Code should include a tristate buffer where the enable signal is active-low (OEN active low for Gowin TBUF)
